items.claim: Tabitha Ricci lacks high-level boxing skills.
items.quote: She doesn't. She doesn't. She does not have good hands.

items.claim: Tabitha Ricci has abandoned the grappling skills that previously brought her success.
items.quote: She abandoned all of the skills that got her here. Her grappling got her here.

items.claim: Chase Hooper is a high-level, slick grappler.
items.quote: Chase Hooper, despite getting knocked out in his last couple fights against very good competition, is a very highlevel slick grappler.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez is winless in the UFC.
items.quote: he's winless in the UFC. Hasn't had a win yet.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez does not possess a granite chin.
items.quote: If Mitch Ramirez was some granite chin savage, let's have a conversation. But he isn't.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier's performance against Marvin Vettori is outdated and not representative of his current form.
items.quote: That was in 2023. That was 3 years ago. And it was impressive. His cardio was impressive. The pressure was impressive. The volume was insane. But then he went on to get KO'ed by standing in the fourth round.

items.claim: Gregory Rodriguez lost to Jared Cannonier primarily due to a lack of cardio.
items.quote: the only reason he won that fight is because Gregory Rodriguez has no cardio whatsoever.
